new_terms.context: ERCOT's mechanism for calculating real-time scarcity price adders based on grid reserves.
Power plants that run only during high demand (scarcity) periods.
A deliberate discount applied to speculative demand forecasts or developer claims.
Studies and planning to ensure the grid has enough capacity to meet long-term demand.
Refers to Texas Senate Bill 6, giving authority to curtail load or manage reserves.
Entities in Texas responsible for the physical transmission of electricity.
